name: SAP SuccessFactors
tagline: Enterprise AI-powered HCM suite with Joule AI copilot
description: SAP SuccessFactors is a comprehensive cloud HCM suite that leverages SAP's Joule AI copilot to transform HR operations. Its AI capabilities span recruiting, onboarding, performance management, learning, compensation, succession planning, and workforce analytics. Joule provides natural language interactions across the platform, helping HR teams and employees get answers, complete tasks, and make decisions faster.
